author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Supporting Cast for 'Honoo no Toukyuujo: Dodge Danko' Announced
The official website of the Honoo no Toukyuujo: Dodge Danko revealed supporting cast and the main visual on Sunday. The anime, adapting Tetsuhiro Koshita's sequel team sports manga, will premiere on Tokyo MX, MBS, and BS11 at 11:00 p.m. every Monday, beginning July 6. Cast Peiko Nikaidou: Yuuki Wakai (Mayonaka Heart Tune) Moe Kusunoki: Azusa Tachibana (Kuroneko to Majo no Kyoushitsu) Akari Higashiyama: Rena Hasegawa (Akujiki Reijou to Kyouketsu Koushaku) Sayo Sakakibara: Saya Hitomi (Shibou...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Higurashi no Naku Koro ni' New Anime Announced
Production company Kadokawa announced a new television anime for the Higurashi no Naku Koro ni (Higurashi: When They Cry) visual novel franchise on Sunday, revealing a teaser visual (pictured) and an announcement video. Studio Deen, the animation studio behind the original 2006 television anime, is returning to produce the new anime. The lead cast from the previous anime installments are also reprising their roles. Cast Keiichi Maebara: Soichiro Hoshi (Mekakucity Actors) Rena Ryuuguu: Mai Nakaha...
